auth_env_var_specs.name: DREAMING_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Bearer token from app.dreaming.com localStorage 'token' or via 'auth login'.

novel_features.name: Roadmap-aware next-video picker
novel_features.description: Get the next unwatched videos tuned to where you are on the fluency roadmap, sorted by fine-grained difficulty.

novel_features.name: CSV bulk external-hours import
novel_features.description: Import a backlog of outside listening/watching hours from a CSV in one command instead of dozens of web-form clicks.

novel_features.name: Difficulty-progression readiness analysis
novel_features.description: See whether the difficulty of what you actually watch is trending up over a window - the real signal that you're ready to level up.

novel_features.name: Unified fluency-ladder roadmap
novel_features.description: The whole L1-L7 ladder with comprehensible-input advisories (speaking, reading, native milestones) and personalized calendar ETAs in one view.

novel_features.name: Caption / transcript fetch
novel_features.description: Fetch a video's captions as clean, timestamp-free plain text (and cache the cue-level transcript).

novel_features.name: Corpus concordance (KWIC) search over all transcripts
novel_features.description: Search every cached transcript for a word, phrase, regex, or verb-tense pattern and get each hit in context with the video, level, guide, and timestamp.
